mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_member(member_number, member_id, member_password, member_name, member_age, member_gender, member_phone_number, member_postcode, member_address, member_detail_addr) VALUES (seq_member.nextval, #{memberId}, #{memberPassword}, #{memberName}, #{memberAge}, #{memberGender}, #{memberPhoneNumber}, #{memberPostcode}, #{memberAddress}, #{memberDetailAddr})
mapper.select: SELECT count(member_number) FROM tbl_member WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT member_number FROM tbl_member WHERE member_id = #{memberId} and member_password = #{memberPassword}
SELECT member_id FROM tbl_member WHERE member_number = #{memberNumber}
